title: 18x Disposable Aluminium Foil Food Container with Lids Perfect for Storage Meal Prep,Takeaway,and Airfryer Cooking Events, BBQ, Parties 14.5 x 12 x 4.5 cm (pack of 18)
features: These containers are reusable, reduce waste, and are also disposable for hassle-free cleanup when needed.
This aluminum foil container is super thick, not flimsy and has a sturdy grip for easy handling and serving.
Aluminium Foil containers with lids are made of high quality food grade aluminium foil, which is non-toxic and odourless.
This set of foil containers with lids are ideal for catering party portions, broiling, baking, cakes, pies, casseroles, baking and more so enjoy it.
These large tin foil containers measure 14.5x12x4.5 cm to hold large quantities of your food.
